untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of put option time value premium against dividend amount. Neither 'put time value', 'option premium', nor 'dividend amount' are available indicators in the allowed set. This is an options-specific calculation requiring real-time dividend data and option Greeks (theta/time decay) that cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_186 describes a dividend arbitrage strategy involving options contracts. The core decision logic depends on: (1) put option time value (requires option chain data and Greeks), (2) ex-dividend date and amount (requires fundamental/calendar data), and (3) riskless arbitrage execution (requires simultaneous options and stock positioning). This falls outside the scope of price-action and technical indicator based backtesting.
